channel.title: 字体 on Luca's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 字体 on Luca's Blog

item.title: iterm2 下几个可以用的字体
item.description:
英文字体

  • osaka
  • brew install –cask font-jetbrains-mono-nerd-font
  • brew install –cask font-fira-code-nerd-font
  • brew install –cask font-ubuntumono-nerd-font

中文字体

  • PingFang SC
  • brew install –cask font-source-han-sans-vf

item.title: 好看的 mono 字体
item.description:
brew install --cask font-jetbrains-mono-nerd-font

JetBrainsMono Nerd Font is worth installing. It displays beautifully in the Terminal.
